title: frankenia hirsuta subsp. laevis
intro: Frankenia hirsuta subsp. laevis, also known as smooth-fruited desert lavender or saltbush, is a plant species that belongs to the family Frankeniaceae and is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Frankenia hirsuta subsp. laevis include treating various ailments such as digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as promoting wound healing and reducing fever. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
